_doc: Phase 3.1 V5 fidelity — DSE sector constituent taxonomy. Maps each of the 8 sectors the brief renders in §06 to its listed scrip codes. The dse_sector_heat scraper averages today's % change across each sector's constituents to produce dse_sector_heat: dict[sector, pct_avg] in latest.json. Simple-average aggregation per the plan.
_status: STARTER — populate from DSE's published sector listings before activating the scraper. Brief side renders gracefully when dse_sector_heat is absent; this file is a no-op until the EconDelta scraper consumes it.
_source_hint: DSE publishes per-sector indices and constituent lists at dsebd.org. The 'Recent Market Information' page (recent_market_information.php) carries per-scrip daily % moves. One fetch can feed all sectors via this file's mapping — avoids 250+ per-scrip page hits.
_aggregation: simple-average of constituent moves per sector. Weighted-by-market-cap is a future refinement; not required for the V1 directional heatmap.

Banks._note: Schedule banks listed on DSE main board. Expand to include all 30+ listed banks before activation.

Pharma._note: Pharmaceuticals and chemicals — a large, important sector.

Fuel._note: Fuel and power — gas, oil, electricity utilities.

Telecom._note: Mobile and fixed-line telecom operators. Small sector — 2-3 majors.

IT._note: Information technology — software, hardware, IT services.
